description: Synthetic label fixtures for smoke tests and optional primary-path latency eval. See fixtures/README.md and docs/POC1_FALLBACK.md.

fixtures.description: Fictitious bottle-style label for manual happy-path checks; included in primary-latency eval for a real-label OpenAI signal alongside seed textures.
Stress-case photo label (glare, curvature, dense government warning, intentional character anomalies). Use for manual runs and ad-hoc POST checks; not in primary-latency eval by default.
Real-photo baseline anchor for the St. Petersburg Spirits bottle (front-on, bright natural lighting, all core text legible).
Real-photo clean baseline variant (alternate scene/lighting); upright front-on bottle with fully visible core label fields.
Real-photo glare variant from the St. Petersburg anchor; mild reflection/brightness wash over brand text while ABV, net contents, and warning remain mostly legible.
Real-photo glare variant: bright shoulder reflection and label hotspot; stresses legibility of government warning and mid-label text.
Real-photo harsh glare: bright centered specular wash on the label obscuring ABV/net-contents lines and much of the government-warning block; brand line may remain partially readable.
Real-photo bourbon whiskey bottle with ~28° yaw from camera; cream label in perspective on marble surface, library-style background; bridges front-on baselines and stronger skew (e.g. vodka 45°).
Real-photo front-on baseline for the St. Petersburg Spirits vodka bottle (frosted glass, cream label, 40% alc./vol. / 750 mL legible); pairs with st_petersburg_vodka_angle_45 for perspective stress.
Real-photo 45-degree angle variant (vodka label) with strong perspective skew and rotated text lines; intended to stress extraction under non-front-on capture.
Real-photo moderate-blur variant from the St. Petersburg anchor; bottle remains centered and mostly legible but detail sharpness is reduced.
Real-photo distance/small-text variant from the St. Petersburg anchor; warning block readability is reduced by smaller on-frame label scale.
Real-photo clean baseline variant in a darker interior setting; upright front-on bottle with fully visible label text.
Real-photo clean baseline variant with city-window background; upright front-on bottle and fully visible core label fields.
Real-photo clean baseline variant (library/lounge background); upright front-on bottle with fully visible core label fields.
Happy-path label with synthetic screen-style glare overlay; correctness eval (non-seed edge). Regenerate via npm run fixtures:edge-labels.
Happy-path label with moderate blur; tuned to stay above image-quality Laplacian gate. Regenerate via npm run fixtures:edge-labels.
Happy-path label rotated ~22° on white (simulated camera tilt). Regenerate via npm run fixtures:edge-labels.
Deterministic noise PNG; passes image-quality gate; default single-call latency eval.
Deterministic noise PNG; passes image-quality gate.
